approval_statement: I, edithatogo, approve bounded pilot attachment stderr-diagnostic request SHA-256 b8c16f51f86b4d1a462edf495dc309f4f6e1dd09c47fb55010a5d08955c40d7f as committed in bcbb5865e8cd48421c013243609c06514f41bf09. I authorize creation of the final diagnostic authorization and one local diagnostic reproduction over the three exact request 11872 PDF attachments pinned by that request, using source root /private/tmp/fyi-attachment-snapshot-11872-approved and output path /private/tmp/foio-bounded-pilot-11872-derived. The reproduction may retain only owner-readable stderr and diagnostic metadata in the governed quarantine under /private/tmp; it must delete transient derived text and must not install a derived-text output directory. Execution is permitted only after the final diagnostic authorization is committed and its exact clean-HEAD verifier passes. This does not authorize context presentation, analyst execution, reconciliation, empirical claims, population inference, archive-wide claims, human-reviewed claims, gold promotion, legal certification, redistribution, publication, training, fine-tuning, release, dataset publication, or paper updates.
